deliverables.summary: ECP Pay v1 implementation is solid and production-ready for internal mode. The core payment flow (Pix, Card, Boleto), provider pattern, security model, database schema, and admin panel are well-built. Gaps are concentrated in 4 missing admin endpoints (splits, tokens, webhooks admin, webhook retry), 3 missing frontend pages (splits, card-vault, audit-log as standalone routes), and minor business rule gaps. None of these block the v1 launch in internal mode.

details.title: Idempotencia
details.evidence: payment.service.ts: checkIdempotency() checks idempotency_key before every create operation. Duplicate key returns existing result. Header X-Idempotency-Key validated in all 3 payment routes (pix, card, boleto). Throws IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_REQUIRED if missing.

details.title: Valores em centavos
details.evidence: All amount fields are INTEGER in SQL schema (001-initial.sql line 12). Zod schemas validate amounts as z.number().int(). No float operations found in payment logic.

details.title: Provider flag
details.evidence: ProviderFactory reads PAYMENT_PROVIDER from feature_flags table (provider.factory.ts). Switchable via POST /admin/providers/switch. Feature flag also editable via PATCH /admin/feature-flags/:key. Audit log recorded on switch.

details.title: Modo internal - Pix auto-approve
details.evidence: internal.adapter.ts: createPixCharge() calls scheduleSettlement(transactionId, this.simulationDelay). Delay configurable via INTERNAL_SIMULATION_DELAY env var (default 3000ms). internal.scheduler.ts processes pending settlements.

details.title: Modo internal - Cartao aprovado se < R$10.000 e nao 9999
details.evidence: internal.adapter.ts lines 100-107: if (last4 === '9999') throws CARD_DECLINED; if (amount > 1000000) throws LIMIT_EXCEEDED. Otherwise status = 'completed'.

details.title: Modo internal - Cartao rejeicao 9999/limite
details.evidence: Same as RN-05: last4 9999 = CARD_DECLINED, amount > 1000000 centavos = LIMIT_EXCEEDED. Both throw AppError with correct error codes.

details.title: Modo internal - Boleto mock
details.evidence: internal.adapter.ts: createBoleto() generates mock barcode via generateBoleto() helper. Admin panel has POST /admin/transactions/:id/simulate-payment endpoint for manual approval. Checks mode === 'internal' before allowing.

details.title: Token vault vinculado a CPF/CNPJ
details.evidence: card_tokens table has customer_document column. card-vault.routes.ts: GET /cards/:customer_document lists by document. Tokens reusable cross-app via card_token field in card charge. source_app tracked per token.

details.title: Split - soma = total
details.evidence: split.service.ts implements createSplit with sum validation per backend-status.json. However, there is no dedicated admin endpoint (GET /admin/splits) exposed in the routes. Split creation from payment endpoints is not wired in payment.routes.ts (splits are only in seed data, not in the payment creation flow). The split service exists but integration into the payment flow is incomplete.

details.title: Webhook retry 3 tentativas com backoff
details.evidence: callback.retry.ts implements retry scheduler with 30s/2min/10min backoff (per backend-status.json). Max 3 attempts. callback.service.ts handles delivery. callback_status and callback_attempts tracked in transactions table.

details.title: Soft delete
details.evidence: card_tokens has deleted_at + is_active fields. card-vault.service.ts uses soft delete (sets is_active=0 and deleted_at). No physical DELETE statements found in any service. Transactions and other records have no delete operations.

details.title: Audit log
details.evidence: audit.ts helper used across all services: payment creation, refund, provider switch, feature flag changes, app registration, login, config updates. audit_logs table has user_id, action, resource, metadata, ip_address, timestamp.

details.title: Rate limiting 100/min por app
details.evidence: rate-limiter.ts: in-memory counter per app (keyed by sourceApp.app_name), windowMs=60000, maxRequests=100. Returns X-RateLimit-Limit/Remaining/Reset headers. Throws 429 RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED. Applied as onRequest hook on /pay/* routes.

details.title: Auth entre servicos via API key
details.evidence: api-key-auth.ts middleware: validates X-API-Key against app_registrations table. Checks is_active. Sets request.sourceApp with app info. Applied to all /pay/* routes via onRequest hook in app.ts.

details.title: Auth do painel via JWT
details.evidence: admin-auth.ts middleware: validates Bearer JWT token, decodes AdminTokenPayload (id, name, email, role). requireRole() factory for RBAC. admin-auth.routes.ts: login with bcrypt password verification, JWT generation with 24h expiry.

details.title: Dados de cartao nunca armazenados
details.evidence: card_tokens table only stores: token, last4, brand, holder_name. internal.adapter.ts generates SHA-256 hash token from card data, stores only last4 and brand. Full card_number and card_cvv never persisted.

details.title: Estorno - cartao/pix 90 dias, boleto nao
details.evidence: internal.adapter.ts refund() correctly blocks boleto refunds (throws TRANSACTION_NOT_REFUNDABLE). However, the 90-day limit for card/pix refunds is NOT enforced. Refunds are allowed regardless of age.

details.title: Callback URL por transacao
details.evidence: callback_url field exists in transactions table. payment.service.ts finalizeTransaction() stores callback_url from request body. However, the fallback to app's default callback_base_url when callback_url is not provided is not clearly implemented in the callback delivery logic — the finalize just stores null if not provided.

details.title: Provider Interface - toda operacao via PaymentProvider
details.evidence: payment-provider.interface.ts defines PaymentProvider with createPixCharge, createCardCharge, createBoleto, refund, getTransactionStatus, parseWebhook. Both InternalAdapter and AsaasAdapter implement it. payment.service.ts only calls ProviderFactory.getProvider().

details.title: Feature flag em runtime sem restart
details.evidence: ProviderFactory.switchProvider() updates feature_flags table and nulls cached instance. getProvider() re-creates adapter on next call. POST /admin/providers/switch and PATCH /admin/feature-flags/:key endpoints available.

details.title: Paridade de contrato Internal/External
details.evidence: Both adapters return identical TypeScript types (PixChargeResult, CardChargeResult, BoletoResult, RefundResult). payment.service.ts uses the same flow regardless of provider. Apps cannot distinguish which provider is active.

details.title: Cofre de tokens - dados sensiveis nunca persistidos
details.evidence: CardChargeResult only has card_token, card_last4, card_brand. card_tokens table only stores token, last4, brand, holder_name, expiry. Full card number and CVV are never written to DB.

details.title: Toda transacao registra source_app
details.evidence: transactions table has source_app NOT NULL. payment.service.ts finalizeTransaction() writes sourceApp from request.sourceApp set by api-key-auth middleware. All seed transactions also have source_app.

details.title: Idempotencia de webhook via event_id
details.evidence: webhook_events table has event_id UNIQUE. webhook.service.ts processes events with dedup (per backend-status.json). Internal adapter parseWebhook() generates event_id.

admin_endpoints.note: Bonus endpoint not in original spec, adds value for internal mode

api_coverage.missing_endpoints_impact: The 4 missing admin endpoints (splits, tokens, webhooks list, webhook retry) affect admin panel completeness but do NOT impact the payment API consumed by ecosystem apps. All 9 payment endpoints are fully implemented.

details.evidence: api-key-auth.ts validates X-API-Key against app_registrations. Checks is_active status. Sets request.sourceApp. Applied via onRequest hook to all /pay/* routes.
admin-auth.ts validates Bearer JWT. Decodes payload with id/name/email/role. Handles TokenExpiredError separately. Applied to all /admin/* routes except /admin/auth/login.

requireRole() factory in admin-auth.ts creates role-check middleware. AdminTokenPayload includes role. admin_users table has role column. However, RBAC enforcement is not consistently applied to all admin endpoints — some endpoints do not use requireRole().
rate-limiter.ts: 100 req/min per app. In-memory counter. Returns rate limit headers. Throws 429. Applied to /pay/* routes.
Card numbers and CVV never persisted. Only token + last4 + brand stored. customer_document (CPF/CNPJ) is stored for business purposes (necessary for vault lookup).
X-Idempotency-Key required on all mutation payment endpoints. Checked before processing. UNIQUE constraint on idempotency_key in transactions table. event_id UNIQUE in webhook_events.

All payment schemas (pixChargeSchema, cardChargeSchema, boletoSchema, refundSchema) use Zod. Admin routes (login, create app, update app, switch provider, patch flag) also use Zod. Request bodies are parsed with .parse() before business logic.
app.ts registers @fastify/cors with origin restricted to CORS_ORIGIN (default localhost:5175).
app.ts registers @fastify/helmet for security headers. CSP disabled for admin SPA.
Centralized error handler (error-handler.ts) registered via setErrorHandler. AppError class with statusCode, errorCode, message pattern. Zod validation errors caught.

observations: RBAC requireRole() exists but is not applied to all admin endpoints — POST /admin/providers/switch should require admin role only
JWT secret has a default fallback value in code — acceptable for dev but must be overridden in production via env var
Rate limiter is in-memory — resets on server restart. Acceptable for v1 but consider persistent store for production

details.evidence: payment-provider.interface.ts defines: createPixCharge, createCardCharge, createBoleto, refund, getTransactionStatus, parseWebhook. All input/output types fully specified with TransactionStatus union type.
internal.adapter.ts implements all 6 methods. QR code generation, card brand detection, boleto generation, refund with partial support, webhook parsing. Simulation delay configurable.
asaas.adapter.ts implements all methods with real HTTP calls. asaas.mapper.ts provides bidirectional mapping. asaas.webhook.ts parses webhooks with token validation.
provider.factory.ts: singleton with lazy creation. Reads from feature_flags table. switchProvider() with audit log. getCurrentMode() accessor. Null-clears instance on switch to force recreation.
Both adapters implement the same TypeScript interface. Return types are structurally identical (PixChargeResult, CardChargeResult, etc.). payment.service.ts is provider-agnostic.

foreign_keys.details: splits.transaction_id -> transactions(id), refunds.transaction_id -> transactions(id), webhook_events.transaction_id -> transactions(id), scheduled_settlements.transaction_id -> transactions(id)

seed_data.app_registrations: 3 apps (ecp-bank, ecp-emps, ecp-food) with correct keys - MATCHES spec
seed_data.transactions: 20 mixed (7 pix, 8 card, 5 boleto) - MATCHES spec
seed_data.splits: 5 food transactions with 3-way split - MATCHES spec

pages.impact: Low — split data visible in transaction detail, but no dedicated management page
Low — token stats not viewable in admin panel, but tokens are managed via payment API
Medium — audit logs are accessible via backend API (GET /admin/audit-logs) but no UI page to browse them

design_spec_compliance.colors: All 14 CSS custom properties applied per design_spec.md
design_spec_compliance.fonts: Inter (sans) + JetBrains Mono (mono) via Google Fonts
design_spec_compliance.theme: Dark only, lime accent for CTAs and active indicators

build_status.bundle_size: 607.61 kB JS (173.90 kB gzipped), 20.14 kB CSS

ui_components.Input: Dark surface, 13px radius, label, error states
ui_components.Badge: Status badges for transactions, types, webhooks, providers
ui_components.Table: Generic typed table with header, rows, onRowClick
ui_components.Modal: Dark overlay, escape key, backdrop click
ui_components.InternalBanner: Yellow warning banner when INTERNAL mode active

details.title: Criar cobranca Pix via API
details.evidence: POST /pay/pix fully implemented with idempotency, QR code generation, scheduled settlement

details.title: Cobrar cartao de credito via API
details.evidence: POST /pay/card with new card, token, installments support

details.title: Emitir boleto registrado via API
details.evidence: POST /pay/boleto with mock barcode, digitable line, embedded Pix QR

details.title: Consultar status de transacao
details.evidence: GET /pay/transactions/:id returns full transaction data

details.title: Estornar transacao total ou parcial
details.evidence: POST /pay/transactions/:id/refund with full/partial support, boleto rejection

details.title: Alternar provider via painel admin
details.evidence: POST /admin/providers/switch with audit log

details.title: Contrato identico independente de provider
details.evidence: Both adapters implement same PaymentProvider interface

details.title: Registrar novo app via painel admin
details.evidence: POST /admin/apps with auto-generated API key, duplicate check

details.title: Auth via API key com rate limiting
details.evidence: api-key-auth.ts + rate-limiter.ts fully implemented

details.title: Tokenizar cartao durante cobranca
details.evidence: save_card=true generates token, stored in card_tokens with soft delete

details.title: Definir regras de split ao criar transacao
details.evidence: split.service.ts exists with sum validation, but split creation is not wired into payment creation endpoints. Splits only exist in seed data.

details.title: Pix auto-aprovado no modo internal
details.evidence: scheduleSettlement() with configurable delay in internal.adapter.ts

details.title: Regras deterministicas de cartao interno
details.evidence: 9999=CARD_DECLINED, >R$10.000=LIMIT_EXCEEDED

details.title: Boleto mock no modo internal
details.evidence: Mock barcode + simulate-payment admin endpoint

details.title: Configurar parametros de simulacao via painel
details.evidence: Settings page + PATCH /admin/config + feature flags endpoints

details.title: Banner visual modo internal
details.evidence: InternalBanner component shown on all admin pages when internal mode active

details.title: Visualizar apps registrados
details.evidence: GET /admin/apps with stats, masked API keys. Apps page in frontend.

details.title: Ver payloads no detalhe da transacao
details.evidence: Transaction detail shows metadata JSON and timeline, but not raw request/response payloads as CodeBlock components

details.title: Idempotency retorna resultado original
details.evidence: checkIdempotency() in payment.service.ts returns existing transaction

details.title: Idempotency_key visivel no detalhe
details.evidence: Transaction detail returns idempotency_key in response, but dedup events are not shown in timeline

details.title: Callbacks automaticos
details.evidence: callback.service.ts delivers callbacks on status change. callback_url stored per transaction.

details.title: Callback retry com backoff
details.evidence: callback.retry.ts with 30s/2min/10min schedule, max 3 attempts

details.title: Gerenciar webhooks no painel admin
details.evidence: Webhooks frontend page exists, but backend endpoints GET /admin/webhooks and POST /admin/webhooks/:id/retry are missing. Webhook data only accessible in transaction detail view.

details.title: Timeline completa no detalhe
details.evidence: admin-transactions.routes.ts builds timeline array from transaction events, webhook events, sorted chronologically

details.title: Dashboard com KPIs e graficos
details.evidence: GET /admin/dashboard returns 10+ KPIs. Frontend dashboard.tsx with Recharts charts.

details.title: Filtrar e buscar transacoes
details.evidence: GET /admin/transactions with 8 filter params (type, status, source_app, date range, search, amount range). Pagination. Frontend transactions.tsx with filter UI.

details.title: Audit log de toda acao admin
details.evidence: auditLog() called on login, provider switch, feature flag change, app CRUD, config update, simulate payment. GET /admin/audit-logs with filters and pagination.

details.title: Acoes operacionais no detalhe
details.evidence: simulate-payment endpoint exists. Refund via payment API. But no direct admin refund/cancel endpoints — operator must use payment API endpoints.

details.title: Login com email/senha e RBAC
details.evidence: admin-auth.routes.ts: login with bcrypt, JWT, /auth/me. RBAC roles defined (admin/operator/viewer). requireRole() middleware available.

critical_issues.title: Split creation not wired into payment flow
critical_issues.description: split.service.ts exists with sum validation (RN-09) but is not called from payment.routes.ts or payment.service.ts. Splits only exist as seed data. To use splits, the payment creation endpoints need to accept a splits array in the request body and call splitService.createSplit().
critical_issues.recommendation: Wire split creation into createPixCharge, createCardCharge, createBoleto in payment.service.ts. Accept optional splits[] in Zod schemas.

critical_issues.title: 4 admin API endpoints missing
critical_issues.description: GET /admin/splits, GET /admin/tokens, GET /admin/webhooks, POST /admin/webhooks/:id/retry are defined in tech_spec.md but not implemented in any route file. The webhooks page on frontend has no backend data source for admin-level webhook listing.
critical_issues.recommendation: Add admin-webhooks.routes.ts and admin-splits.routes.ts (or extend admin-config.routes.ts). Prioritize GET /admin/webhooks for the frontend webhooks page.

critical_issues.title: 90-day refund window not enforced
critical_issues.description: RN-17 specifies card and Pix refunds should be limited to 90 days. The refund logic checks status but not transaction age. Refunds are allowed on any completed transaction regardless of when it was created.
critical_issues.recommendation: Add a date check in internal.adapter.ts refund() and payment.service.ts refundTransaction(): compare created_at with current date, reject if > 90 days.

observations: The implementation quality is consistently high across all files — clean TypeScript, proper error handling, Zod validation, and audit logging
Provider Pattern is exceptionally well-implemented — the cleanest architectural piece of the codebase
Database schema matches tech_spec.md exactly — all 10 tables, all 15 indexes, all foreign keys correct
Seed data matches specification perfectly — admin user, 3 apps, 20 transactions, 3 tokens, splits, webhook events
Frontend build passes TypeScript check with 0 errors and Vite build succeeds — no compile-time issues

The InternalAdapter handles '__pending__' source_app and idempotency_key which are then finalized by payment.service.ts — this two-phase insert is a clever pattern to avoid passing source_app through the provider interface

RBAC roles are defined in the data model and JWT but requireRole() middleware is not consistently applied to all admin endpoints — some endpoints are accessible by any authenticated admin user regardless of role
The /admin/auth/me endpoint correctly uses a preHandler instead of the global admin auth hook, maintaining separation of login (unauthenticated) and protected routes
Frontend has 3 missing dedicated pages (splits, card-vault, audit-log) but the 8 implemented pages cover the primary admin workflows

The tech_spec mentions 29 endpoints (9 payment + 20 admin) but the implementation has 26 (9 payment + 17 admin), with 4 admin endpoints missing and 1 bonus endpoint (simulate-payment) not in the original spec

recommendations.title: Wire split creation into payment flow
recommendations.description: Add optional splits[] parameter to Pix/Card/Boleto Zod schemas and call splitService.createSplit() in payment.service.ts. This completes RN-09 and unblocks ecp-food marketplace flows.

recommendations.title: Add missing admin webhook endpoints
recommendations.description: Create GET /admin/webhooks (list with filters) and POST /admin/webhooks/:id/retry. The frontend webhooks page already exists and needs these endpoints to display data.

recommendations.title: Enforce 90-day refund window
recommendations.description: Add date validation to refund logic per RN-17. Check that transaction.created_at is within 90 days of current date before allowing refund.

recommendations.title: Add missing frontend pages
recommendations.description: Create /audit-log, /splits, and /card-vault pages. Audit log is most important for operational visibility. Splits and card-vault can show statistics and lists.

recommendations.title: Apply RBAC consistently
recommendations.description: Add requireRole() middleware to admin endpoints that modify data (provider switch, config update, app management). Currently any authenticated admin can perform any action.

recommendations.title: Improve callback URL fallback
recommendations.description: When a transaction is created without callback_url, the callback delivery should fall back to the app's callback_base_url from app_registrations. Verify this fallback works in callback.service.ts.
